reviews.review_title: Not ready for use as of 4.28.25.
reviews.review_description: Can’t interact with the main page. No discernible menu or interface with the controllers. Will be requesting a refund.

developer_response.body: Hello Steven, you can use the hammer to press on the buttons on panel infront of you. Do let us know if you face more issues

reviews.review_title: Me See Me Smash Me Happy
reviews.review_description: Fun game. Would love more scenes and things to break and some haptic feedback.
